overall.description: A third-person game scene following an armored knight holding a torch through a dark, foggy garden at night. The character walks past flowering bushes and stone structures, through an area with magical purple flames, and arrives at a stone shrine with lit candles.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown garden path with flowering bushes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through garden holding torch, approaching a stone tower structure

entered.detail: bushes with pink flowers lining the path
cylindrical stone tower with narrow windows
tall tree trunk with spreading branches overhead
distant purple magical light visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The armored character walks through an overgrown garden path at night, holding a torch that illuminates pink flowering bushes on the left. A large tree stands ahead while a round stone tower becomes visible on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: ritual clearing with magical purple braziers

events.description: area becomes illuminated by purple magical flames on stone pedestals
walking through the field of burning purple braziers

agents.ego_description: walking through the purple flame area, observing the magical fires

entered.detail: stone pedestal burning with purple magical flame
stone pedestal burning with purple magical flame
stone pedestal burning with purple magical flame

segments.scene_description: The character passes the stone tower and enters a clearing filled with magical purple braziers burning on stone pedestals. The purple flames cast an eerie glow across the open area as the character walks between them.

events.description: exiting the purple flame area, returning to darker torch-lit environment
approaching the illuminated stone gazebo shrine with candles

agents.ego_description: walking toward a stone shrine with lit candles, passing through trees

entered.detail: round stone structure with columns and domed roof
wooden barrel with metal bands next to the shrine
distant building with warm yellow light in windows

segments.scene_description: Leaving the purple flames behind, the character walks through a darker wooded area toward a stone gazebo shrine that becomes visible ahead. A wooden barrel sits near the shrine as the character approaches the lit candles inside.

events.description: character stops walking and begins observing the shrine
camera pans to look back toward the purple flames in the distance

agents.ego_description: standing at the stone shrine, examining the candles and looking around the area

entered.detail: multiple lit candles burning inside the stone shrine

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the stone shrine to observe the lit candles inside. The camera pans around to survey the surroundings, revealing the purple braziers now visible again in the distant background through the trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, overgrown garden that transitions from a torch-lit path into a mystical clearing and finally to a quiet stone shrine. It begins with an armored character walking past pink flowering bushes and a large tree, with a round stone tower emerging on the left. As the character passes the tower, the scene opens into a clearing where the warm torchlight is joined by the eerie glow of magical purple braziers burning on stone pedestals. The camera then follows the character through a darker wooded area, passing a wooden barrel before arriving at a stone gazebo shrine filled with lit candles. Finally, the character stops at the shrine as the camera pans around to reveal the purple braziers glowing in the distant background through the trees.
